title: PeerInfo
description:
Metadata about a peer Assay instance that can receive signals.

Registered via [`StateBackend::register_peer`] on startup, queried via
[`StateBackend::list_peers`] during signal forwarding.

peer_id.description: Unique identifier for this peer (typically hostname or UUID).

signal_url.description: Signal endpoint URL of this peer (e.g. `http://127.0.0.1:7432`).
